Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you save your game, it also saves {f 0 1 2}a little bit of your past{f 0 1 27}. You can go back to that time by opening the menu with {f 1 3 112}, going to SYSTEM, and selecting REWIND.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you select a REWIND slot, you will be returned to a point where you could roam freely shortly before you saved your game.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Note that the REWIND function {f 0 1 2}does not save your new starting point automatically{f 0 1 27}. If you use this function, make sure you continue to save your game as necessary.[n]{f 1 1}
